# majordome_utilities.plotting

```{python}
from majordome_utilities.documents import *
from majordome_utilities.plotting import (
    MajordomePlot,
    PowerFormatter,
    centered_colormap,
)
```

```{python}
entry = SignatureEntry(MajordomePlot)
entry.documentation()
```

```{python}
document_class_members(MajordomePlot)
```

```{python}
document_class_members(MajordomePlot,
                       disable_normal_methods=True,
                       include_properties=True)
```

```{python}
document_class_members(MajordomePlot,
                       disable_normal_methods=True,
                       include_class_methods=True)
```

```{python}
entry = SignatureEntry(PowerFormatter)
entry.documentation()
```

## General utilities

```{python}
entry = SignatureEntry(centered_colormap)
entry.documentation()
```
